meaning: Video Graphics Array,视频图形适配器
examples: The front-facing VGA camera is good for exactly two things.
MP Rear-Facing (1080p Video Capture) + VGA Front-Facing Cameras
You can convert it to VGA through a special cable (see Resources for more information).
Both an HDMI and VGA port are provided to enable connection to two displays simultaneously.
The full 1080p widescreen displays feature enhanced digital connectivity including HDMI or DVI, VGA and DisplayPort.
